conventions.name: top-level-project-directories
conventions.description: Farrier keeps runtime TypeScript under src and tests under tests.

conventions.name: source-subsystems-exist
conventions.description: The main source tree is split into CLI, engine, packs, and TUI subsystems.

conventions.name: pack-modules-export-pack
conventions.description: Each stack pack module exports a Pack named after the file.

conventions.name: engine-modules-should-have-direct-tests
conventions.description: Engine modules should have a direct tests/<module>.test.ts file so structural coverage is easy to find.

conventions.name: cli-subcommands-export-runner
conventions.description: Each CLI subcommand module exports its run function.

conventions.name: engine-does-not-depend-on-tui
conventions.description: Engine code must stay independent of terminal UI components.

conventions.name: packs-do-not-depend-on-engine-or-tui
conventions.description: Pack declarations stay as static data and must not import runtime engine or TUI modules.

conventions.name: cli-does-not-depend-on-tui
conventions.description: CLI subcommands stay non-interactive and do not import TUI components.

conventions.name: tests-use-bun-test
conventions.description: TypeScript tests use Bun's test runner API.
